item.title: 小米 Vision GT 概念超跑亮相巴塞罗那
item.guid: 小米-Vision-GT-概念超跑亮相巴塞罗那
item.description:
Last night, Xiaomi held the global launch event for the Xiaomi 17 Series in Barcelona, Spain. The Xiaomi Vision GT two-door supercar concept car officially debuted, becoming the most visually impactful "One more thing" of the entire conference. 昨晚，小米在西班牙巴塞罗那举行 Xiaomi 17 Series 全球发布会，小米 Vision GT 双门超跑概念车正式亮相，成为整场发布会最具视觉冲击力的「One more thing」。

This Vision GT features an ultra-low, wide-body design, with body lines emphasizing aerodynamic efficiency. It is equipped with a central cockpit, scissor doors, a massive carbon fiber rear wing, and circular star-ring taillights, making its overall shape closer to a track-level prototype car. 这款 Vision GT 采用极致低趴宽体设计，车身线条强调空气动力学效率，配备中置驾驶舱、剪刀门、巨型碳纤维尾翼与环形星环尾灯，整体造型更接近赛道级原型车。

Xiaomi stated that the car combines an extremely low drag coefficient with powerful downforce, aiming to maximize performance without relying on additional aerodynamic kits. Li Tianyuan, Xiaomi's chief designer, stated that "less is more" is the core philosophy, with almost every exterior detail serving an aerodynamic function. 小米方面表示，该车兼具极低风阻系数与强大下压力，目标是在不依赖额外空气动力学套件的前提下实现性能最大化。小米首席设计师李田原称「少即是多」是核心理念，几乎每一处外观都承担空气动力学功能。

The cockpit continues Xiaomi's smart cockpit design language, featuring a panoramic sky screen display and supporting human-car-home connectivity. The center console retains physical buttons, including a circular pointer-style air conditioning knob and an aircraft thrust lever-style gear selector. 座舱部分延续小米智能座舱设计语言，搭载全景显示天际屏，支持人车家联动。中控岛保留实体按键，包括圆形指针式空调旋钮与飞机推杆式档把。

It is reported that the car will be available in "Gran Turismo 7" in the future, allowing PS5 players to experience this concept electric supercar in the game. 据悉，该车未来将登陆《GT 赛车 7》，PS5 玩家可在游戏中体验这款概念级电动超跑。

The Xiaomi 17 Ultra overseas Leica version LEITZPHONE was also released. This model adjusted the Leica Logo arrangement and frame design in terms of appearance details, and the battery capacity was adjusted from 6800mAh in the domestic version to 6000mAh. It also supports imaging control designs such as the Master Zoom Ring, but the price has significantly increased to 1999 Euros (approximately 16,000 RMB) . 小米 17 Ultra 海外徕卡版 LEITZPHONE 同步发布。该机型在外观细节上调整了徕卡 Logo 排列方式与边框设计，电池容量从国内版的 6800mAh 调整为 6000mAh，同样支持大师变焦环等影像操控设计， 但售价大幅提升至 1999 欧元（约合 1.6 万元人民币） 。

The global version of the Xiaomi 17 series, starting at 999 Euros, as well as the Xiaomi Tag tracker and Xiaomi Electric Scooter 6 series, were also released at this conference. 本次发布会上还发布了小米 17 系列全球版，售价 999 欧元起，以及小米 Tag 追踪器和小米电动滑板车 6 系列。

item.title: 不止手机，汽车或因存储芯片成本飙升涨价
item.guid: 不止手机，汽车或因存储芯片成本飙升涨价
item.description:
According to a report by China Business News, the automotive industry is facing a new wave of storage chip price increases this year. Prices for automotive-grade DRAM and NAND Flash continue to climb, driving up overall vehicle costs, and some models have already shown signs of rising retail prices. 据第一财经报道，今年汽车行业正面临新一轮存储芯片涨价潮，车规级 DRAM 与 NAND Flash 价格持续攀升，带动整车成本上扬，部分车型已出现终端售价上涨迹象。

Storage chips used in automobiles mainly include DRAM and NAND Flash, with DRAM being the most scarce category currently. Relevant personnel from Beijing Ingenic Semiconductor stated that the supply of automotive DRAM chips will remain tight in 2026, with prices continuing to rise and no room for price reduction for now. 汽车使用的存储芯片主要包括 DRAM 与 NAND Flash，其中 DRAM 是当前最紧缺的品类。北京君正集成电路相关人士表示，2026 年汽车 DRAM 芯片供应依旧紧张，价格持续上涨，且暂无降价空间。

According to TrendForce data, prices for general-purpose DRAM are expected to rise by 55% to 60%, NAND Flash by 33% to 38%, and spot prices for high-end automotive-grade DDR5 even reaching a 300% increase. 根据 TrendForce 数据，通用型 DRAM 价格预计上涨 55%～60%，NAND Flash 上涨 33%～38%，高端车规级 DDR5 现货涨幅甚至达到 300%。

NIO CEO Li Bin, Xiaomi Group Chairman Lei Jun, and other senior executives from car manufacturers have publicly expressed concerns about rising memory prices. Lei Jun stated that memory prices are increasing quarterly, with a 40% to 50% increase last quarter, and will continue to rise this year. 蔚来 CEO 李斌、小米集团董事长雷军等多位车企高层已公开表达对内存涨价的担忧。雷军表示，内存价格按季度上涨，上季度涨幅达 40%～50%，今年仍将继续上涨。

A HSBC research report points out that rising storage chip prices could lead to an increase of 1000 to 3000 yuan in overall vehicle costs, with a more significant impact on electric vehicles. 汇丰研报指出，存储芯片涨价可能带来 1000～3000 元的整车成本提升，对电动车影响更为明显。

item.title: DeepSeek 突发访问异常，新模型 V4 最快或下周发布
item.guid: DeepSeek-突发访问异常，新模型-V4-最快或下周发布
item.description:
According to the Financial Times, DeepSeek is expected to officially release its new multimodal large language model V4 in early March. This marks the company's first major version update since the launch of its R1 inference model last January. 据《金融时报》消息，DeepSeek 或于 3 月初正式发布全新多模态大语言模型 V4。这是该公司自去年 1 月推出 R1 推理模型以来的首个重大版本更新。

It is reported that V4 natively supports image, video, and text generation. DeepSeek will also simultaneously release a brief technical note on the day of the launch, followed by a detailed engineering report approximately one month later. 据悉，V4 原生支持图片、视频与文本生成，DeepSeek 还将在发布当天同步公开一份简短技术说明，并于约一个月后发布详尽的工程报告。

Notably, DeepSeek has partnered with Huawei and Cambricon to optimize the operating environment for the V4 model, which is expected to significantly boost local semiconductor demand and accelerate the shift of AI inference to domestic chips. 值得注意的是，DeepSeek 已与华为和寒武纪合作优化 V4 模型的运行环境，预计将显著提振本土半导体需求，加速 AI 推理环节向国产芯片靠拢。

Yesterday afternoon, DeepSeek services experienced access anomalies, with many users reporting 'server busy' or unresponsiveness on the web and app. A reporter's actual test found that the DeepSeek App repeatedly returned the message 'Please check your network and try again'. 昨天下午，DeepSeek 服务出现访问异常，大量用户反馈网页端和 App 提示「服务器繁忙」或无法响应。记者实测发现，DeepSeek App 多次返回「请检查网络后重试」的提示。

item.title: 曝新款 Apple Watch 支持指纹识别
item.guid: 曝新款-Apple-Watch-支持指纹识别
item.description:
The latest information from 9to5Mac and Macworld indicates that Touch ID is very likely to debut on 2026 Apple Watch models. 9to5Mac 与 Macworld 的最新信息显示，Touch ID 很可能首次登陆 2026 款 Apple Watch 机型。

Macworld reporter Filipe Esposito discovered fields pointing to 'AppleMesa' in Apple's internal code, a name long considered Apple's internal codename for Touch ID. The code explicitly points to 2026 Apple Watch models, indicating that Apple is testing some form of biometric authentication. Macworld 记者 Filipe Esposito 在苹果内部代码中发现了指向「AppleMesa」的字段，这一名称长期被视为苹果内部对 Touch ID 的代号。代码明确指向 2026 款 Apple Watch，显示苹果正在测试某种形式的生物识别认证。

Apple has not yet disclosed hardware details, but reports suggest that Touch ID could be implemented in the following ways: 目前苹果尚未披露硬件细节，但报道认为，Touch ID 的实现方式可能包括以下几种：

    Integrated into the side button

    Integrated into the Digital Crown

    Integrated into the Action button

Given the size constraints of the Apple Watch, the industry generally believes that Apple may adopt an integrated solution similar to the iPad Air's power button, to enhance security and unlocking efficiency without changing the appearance. 考虑到 Apple Watch 的体积限制，业内普遍认为苹果可能采用类似 iPad Air 电源键式的整合方案，以在不改变外观的前提下提升安全性与解锁效率。

In addition to fingerprint recognition, the Apple Watch Ultra 4 is rumored to bring upgrades such as a brighter display, longer battery life, and a new array of health sensors. Supply chain sources say that the new sensors will reduce reliance on algorithmic inference, which is expected to improve the accuracy of health data and enhance overall performance. 除指纹识别外，Apple Watch Ultra 4 据传还将带来更高亮度显示、更长续航以及全新健康传感器阵列等升级。供应链消息称，新传感器将减少对算法推断的依赖，有望提升健康数据精度并改善整体性能。

item.title: 周意保展示 Find N6 真机：折痕控制「久用平整」
item.guid: 周意保展示-Find-N6-真机：折痕控制「久用平整」
item.description:
Yesterday, Zhou Yibao, product manager for the OPPO Find series, showcased the crease control performance of the upcoming OPPO Find N6 foldable phone on Weibo. 昨天，OPPO Find 系列产品负责人周意保在微博展示即将发布的 OPPO Find N6 折叠屏手机的折痕控制表现。

In the video, Zhou Yibao showcased the actual device taken from the water, with almost no creases visible on the front and sides. He stated, "Shallow out of the factory is not truly shallow; shallow after long-term use is truly shallow," emphasizing that the core challenge for foldable screens lies in structural stability after prolonged folding. 在视频中，周意保展示了从水中取出的真机，正面与侧面几乎看不到折痕。他表示「出厂浅不是真的浅，久用浅才是真的浅」，强调折叠屏核心难题在于长期折叠后的结构稳定性。

Previously, the Find N6 had passed TÜV Rheinland testing and was dubbed the "world's flattest" foldable phone. It will debut two new technologies: "crease-free titanium alloy hinge" and "self-healing memory glass." 此前，Find N6 已通过莱茵测试，被称为「全球最平整」的折叠机，并将首发「无痕钛合金铰链」与「自修复记忆玻璃」两项新技术。

Zhou Yibao also previously confirmed that the Find N6 will support a stylus and will be the first to feature an "AI stylus" with industry-first AI capabilities. The new device is expected to be officially released in March. 周意保此前还确认，Find N6 将支持手写笔，并首次搭载「AI 手写笔」，具备行业首发的 AI 功能，新机预计三月正式发布。

item.title: 英伟达或将推出新推理芯片
item.guid: 英伟达或将推出新推理芯片
item.description:
According to The Wall Street Journal, Nvidia is preparing to launch a new AI inference chip, which it plans to officially unveil at this year's GTC developer conference in San Jose. 据《华尔街日报》报道，英伟达正准备推出一款全新的人工智能推理芯片，计划在今年于圣何塞举行的 GTC 开发者大会上正式公布。

It is understood that this new product will integrate Groq's chip technology, aiming to significantly improve inference computing efficiency and address pressure from competitors such as Google and Amazon. 据悉，这款新品将整合 Groq 的芯片技术，旨在显著提升推理计算效率，并应对来自 Google、亚马逊等竞争对手的压力。

The report points out that while Nvidia's Hopper, Blackwell, and Rubin series GPUs still dominate in the training domain, some customers find GPUs too expensive and power-intensive for inference scenarios, prompting Nvidia to accelerate the launch of more targeted inference chips. 报道指出，尽管英伟达的 Hopper、Blackwell 与 Rubin 系列 GPU 在训练领域仍占据主导，但部分客户认为 GPU 在推理场景中过于昂贵且能耗较高，促使英伟达加速推出更具针对性的推理芯片。

OpenAI has agreed to be one of the main customers for this new processor, having previously announced its intention to purchase Nvidia's "dedicated inference computing power." OpenAI 已同意成为这款新处理器的主要客户之一，并在此前宣布将采购英伟达的「专用推理算力」。

Furthermore, Nvidia recently expanded its collaboration with Meta, adopting a CPU-only solution for the first time in a large-scale deployment to support AI Agents related to ad delivery. 此外，英伟达近期与 Meta 扩大合作，首次在大规模部署中采用 CPU-only 方案，以支持广告投放相关的 AI Agent。

item.title: 宇树科技王兴兴：希望未来实现「机器人生产机器人」
item.guid: 宇树科技王兴兴：希望未来实现「机器人生产机器人」
item.description:
According to China Securities Journal, Wang Xingxing, founder and chairman of Unitree Robotics, recently stated at the Humanoid Robot and Embodied AI Standardization (HEIS) annual conference that the company has been continuously promoting the deployment of humanoid robots in factories over the past few years, and hopes to achieve "robots producing robots" in its own factories in the future. 据中证报报道，宇树科技创始人兼董事长王兴兴近日在人形机器人与具身智能标准化（HEIS）年会上表示，公司过去几年持续推动人形机器人在工厂落地，并希望未来能在自家工厂实现「机器人生产机器人」。

Wang Xingxing introduced that currently, when humanoid robots perform single tasks, if sufficiently trained, the success rate can basically reach 100%; however, there is still room for improvement in success rates when long-term task planning is involved. 王兴兴介绍，目前人形机器人在执行单一任务时，如果训练充分，成功率基本可以达到 100%；但在涉及长任务规划时，成功率仍有提升空间。

He emphasized that robot mobility is a "prerequisite for work." When the stability and richness of movement are high enough, the robot's replicability and stability will also increase. 他强调，机器人运动能力是「干活的先决必要条件」，当运动的稳定性与丰富度足够高，机器人的可复制性与稳定性也会随之增强。

Regarding industry standards, Wang Xingxing pointed out that robots need a complete standard system for key indicators such as efficiency, stability, and safety. 在行业标准方面，王兴兴指出，机器人在效率、稳定性、安全性等关键指标上都需要建立完整的标准体系。

He stated that Unitree Robotics hopes to actively participate in promoting the standardization of industry standards to foster healthy industry development. He believes that the robotics industry is still in its early stages, and healthy competition along with unified standards will help push the industry towards maturity. 他表示，宇树科技希望积极参与推动行业标准规范化，以促进行业健康发展。他认为，目前机器人行业仍处于早期阶段，良性竞争与统一标准将有助于推动产业走向成熟。

item.title: 蔚来李斌获中国人工智能最高奖
item.guid: 蔚来李斌获中国人工智能最高奖
item.description:
Recently, the Chinese Association for Artificial Intelligence announced the evaluation results for the 2025 "Wu Wenjun Artificial Intelligence Science and Technology Award." 近日，中国人工智能学会公布 2025 年度「吴文俊人工智能科学技术奖」评审结果。

The research achievement "Key Technologies and Industrial Applications of Spatiotemporal Cognition from Visual Understanding to World Models," primarily completed by Professor Ren Shaoqing of the University of Science and Technology of China, NIO CEO Li Bin, and others, received the first prize for scientific and technological progress. 由中国科学技术大学教授任少卿、蔚来 CEO 李斌等作为主要完成人的科研成果「从视觉理解到世界模型的时空认知关键技术及产业应用」，获得科技进步奖一等奖。

This award is hailed as the "highest award in Chinese AI," representing the highest honor in the field of intelligent science and technology in China. 该奖项被誉为「中国人工智能最高奖」，代表国内智能科学技术领域的最高荣誉。

The project addresses the key challenge of "spatiotemporal cognition," building a technical system from visual understanding to world models, achieving multiple original breakthroughs, including candidate box generation algorithms and region proposal network modules based on deep neural networks, end-to-end object detection paradigms, and world models with spatiotemporal cognitive abilities. 项目围绕「时空认知」关键难题，构建了从视觉理解到世界模型的技术体系，形成多项原创性突破，包括基于深度神经网络的候选框生成算法及区域提议网络模块、端到端目标检测范式，以及具备时空认知能力的世界模型。

NIO's official Weibo pointed out that the new version of the "NIO World Model," based on this award-winning achievement, was fully pushed to over 600,000 users on January 28 this year, becoming the first intelligent assisted driving system in China based on the "world model + closed-loop reinforcement learning" development paradigm. 蔚来官方微博指出，基于此次获奖成果的「蔚来世界模型」全新版本已于今年 1 月 28 日全量推送超 60 万用户，成为国内首个基于「世界模型 + 闭环强化学习」研发范式的智能辅助驾驶系统。

item.title: 面壁智能获数亿元融资，中国电信领投
item.guid: 面壁智能获数亿元融资，中国电信领投
item.description:
Yesterday, ModelBest officially announced that it recently completed its first round of financing this year, totaling several hundred million yuan, led by China Telecom, with CITIC Goldstone and CITIC Private Equity as co-investors. 昨天，面壁智能官宣于近日完成今年首轮数亿元融资，由中国电信领投、中信金石与中信私募跟投。

ModelBest stated that China Telecom will serve as a strategic investor, engaging in deep collaboration with the company in areas such as cloud (computing power), network, and edge; ModelBest, in turn, will leverage its experience in algorithm implementation across industries like general legal, automotive, and education to jointly promote the research and application of AI in more complex scenarios. 面壁智能表示，中国电信将作为战略投资方，与公司在云（算力）、网、端等方向展开深度协同；面壁则将依托其在泛司法、汽车、教育等行业的算法落地经验，共同推动 AI 在更复杂场景中的研发与应用。

Minibeam AI CEO Li Dahai stated that the company will continue to prioritize enhancing model knowledge density as its first principle, adhere to the open-source route, build high-performance, lightweight models, and drive every terminal towards AGI in the physical world. 面壁智能 CEO 李大海表示，公司将继续以提升模型知识密度为第一性原理，坚持开源路线，打造高性能、轻量化模型，推动每一个终端迈向物理世界的 AGI。

item.title: 立讯精密递表港交所：前三季度营收 2209 亿
item.guid: 立讯精密递表港交所：前三季度营收-2209-亿
item.description:
According to Leidi's report, Luxshare Precision recently submitted a prospectus to the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, planning to list in Hong Kong this year, forming an "A+H" share structure. This Shenzhen-headquartered precision manufacturing enterprise is already listed on the A-share market, with a current market value of approximately 365.1 billion yuan. 据雷递报道，立讯精密日前向港交所递交招股书，计划在今年于香港上市，形成「A+H」股架构。这家总部位于深圳的精密智造企业已在 A 股上市，当前市值约 3651 亿元。

Luxshare Precision disclosed its operating performance over the past few years in its prospectus: 立讯精密在招股书中披露了过去数年的经营表现：

    The company's revenues from 2022 to 2024 were 214 billion, 231.9 billion, and 268.79 billion yuan, respectively, with profits growing from 10.49 billion yuan to 14.58 billion yuan during the period;

    In the first three quarters of this year, the company's revenue reached 220.9 billion yuan, with a profit of 12.728 billion yuan and a profit margin of 5.8%.

Luxshare Precision was founded in 2004, starting with its connector business, gradually entering Apple's supply chain, and becoming one of Apple's largest suppliers in 2021. With business expansion, Wang Laichun ranked 55th on the "2025 Hurun Rich List" with a fortune of 85.5 billion yuan. 立讯精密创立于 2004，从连接器业务起步，逐步进入苹果供应链，并在 2021 年成为苹果最大供应商之一。随着业务扩张，王来春在《2025 胡润百富榜》中以 855 亿元财富排名第 55 位。

item.title: 💡 亚马逊 CEO：AI 时代「堆人力」的岗位将大幅减少
item.guid: 💡-亚马逊-CEO：AI-时代「堆人力」的岗位将大幅减少
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Amazon CEO Andy Jassy recently stated that many jobs that relied on "piling up manpower" over the past two or three decades will no longer require the same scale of human involvement with the advancement of AI. 据《商业内幕》报道，亚马逊 CEO 安迪·贾西（Andy Jassy）近日表示，过去二三十年依赖「堆人力」完成的大量岗位，在 AI 的推动下将不再需要同等规模的人类参与。

He emphasized that this is not a simple disappearance of jobs, but a structural reorganization: 他强调，这并非简单的岗位消失，而是结构性重组：

AI will eliminate some repetitive, process-oriented jobs while also giving rise to new professional forms. For example, the role of a cloud solutions architect did not exist 15 years ago, but now there are tens of thousands of practitioners.

Forbes China cited Jassy's previous memo to employees, pointing out that as Amazon widely adopts AI across the company, "the overall corporate workforce will shrink in the coming years." 福布斯中文网援引贾西此前致员工的备忘录指出，随着亚马逊在全公司范围内广泛采用 AI，「未来几年整体企业员工规模将会缩减」。

In January this year, Jassy further stated at the Davos Forum that white-collar jobs such as programming, customer service, research, and analysis will all be profoundly affected by AI. Amazon has laid off employees multiple times in the past year: 14,000 people were cut in October last year, and another 16,000 jobs were eliminated in January this year to reduce bureaucracy and improve efficiency. 今年 1 月，贾西在达沃斯论坛上进一步表示，编程、客服、研究与分析等白领岗位都将受到 AI 的深刻影响。亚马逊过去一年已多次裁员：去年 10 月裁撤 1.4 万人，今年 1 月再削减约 1.6 万个岗位，以减少官僚主义并提升效率。

At the industry level, Microsoft announced the reduction of approximately 15,000 positions last year, and Meta also scaled down its teams due to automation advancements. 行业层面上，微软去年宣布裁减约 1.5 万个职位，Meta 也因自动化推进而缩减团队规模。

Despite this, Jassy remains relatively optimistic. He believes that AI does not bring about a one-dimensional "job disappearance" but rather a cross-industry "transition period." 尽管如此，贾西仍保持相对乐观态度。他认为，AI 带来的不是单向度的「岗位消失」，而是一次跨行业的「转型期」。

AI is driving up demand for specific engineering roles and has also spawned new markets such as training data. As for what entirely new professional forms will emerge in the future, it remains unclear, but he emphasized that companies and employees will "go through this transition period together." AI 正推高特定工程类岗位的需求，也催生了训练数据等新市场。至于未来会出现哪些全新的职业形态，目前仍不明朗，但他强调企业与员工将「一起走过这个过渡期」。

item.title: 阿里开源桌面 Agent 工具 CoPaw，支持云端本地一键部署
item.guid: 阿里开源桌面-Agent-工具-CoPaw，支持云端本地一键部署
item.description:
Yesterday, Alibaba officially open-sourced the desktop Agent tool CoPaw, positioned as a locally deployable and deeply customizable personal intelligent assistant platform, supporting multi-channel dialogue, scheduled task execution, and possessing highly modular extension capabilities. 昨天，阿里正式开源桌面 Agent 工具 CoPaw，定位为可本地部署、可深度二次开发的个人智能助理平台，支持多通道对话、定时任务执行，并具备高度模块化的扩展能力。

According to the introduction, CoPaw natively supports chat platforms such as DingTalk, Feishu, QQ, Discord, and iMessage, and has built-in multiple skills like document processing, news summarization, and file management. 据介绍，CoPaw 原生支持钉钉、飞书、QQ、Discord、iMessage 等聊天平台，并内置文档处理、新闻摘要、文件管理等多项 Skills。

In daily scenarios, CoPaw can automatically summarize emails, generate weekly reports, record diet and fitness data, and also crawl popular content from social platforms, generate script drafts, and more. 在日常场景中，CoPaw 可自动汇总邮件、生成周报、记录饮食与健身数据，也能爬取社交平台热门内容、生成脚本草稿等。

📖 Official Documentation: https://copaw.agentscope.io/docs/quickstart/ 📖 官方文档： https://copaw.agentscope.io/docs/quickstart/

💻 GitHub: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/CoPaw 💻 GitHub： https://github.com/agentscope-ai/CoPaw

item.title: 三大外卖平台响应网络餐饮新规，强化「明厨亮灶」监管
item.guid: 三大外卖平台响应网络餐饮新规，强化「明厨亮灶」监管
item.description:
According to Jiemian News and Consumer Daily, Meituan, Taobao Flash Sale, and JD Waimai, the three major food delivery platforms, recently collectively responded to the new online catering regulations issued by the State Administration for Market Regulation, proposing further measures focusing on food safety system construction, social co-governance mechanisms, and technological investment. 据界面新闻和《消费日报》报道，美团、淘宝闪购、京东外卖三大外卖平台近日集中回应国家市场监督管理总局发布的网络餐饮新规，围绕食品安全体系建设、社会共治机制以及技术投入等方面提出进一步举措。

    Meituan stated that last year, over 400,000 merchants had activated "Bright Kitchens" (Mingchu Liangzao) and received support such as cash and traffic. In the future, Meituan will continue to provide financial, traffic, and technical support to catering merchants, accelerating the development of food safety AI products like image recognition and back-kitchen early warning systems.

    Taobao Flash Sale stated that the platform is promoting a "3+1+AI" food safety co-governance system, which includes strict merchant entry reviews, dynamic inspection and spot checks, an open and transparent "Internet+Bright Kitchens" supervision mechanism, and the introduction of a rider "snap and report" function for reporting potential risks such as abnormal licenses and permits or unsanitary environments.

    JD Waimai emphasized its "quality takeaway" positioning, stating that it has established multiple online and offline review mechanisms such as video verification, photo re-inspection, and rider supervision to reject "ghost takeaways." It is also promoting the docking of merchant electronic license data with regulatory authorities in various regions to strengthen license verification and management capabilities.

item.title: 喜茶 heytea lab 2.0 全国首店落地上海
item.guid: 喜茶-heytea-lab-2.0-全国首店落地上海
item.description:
Yesterday, HEYTEA opened its first national heytea lab 2.0 store in Shanghai's Fengshengli. The store, themed "Unfinished," brings together four major labs – tea lab, cake lab, gelato lab, and bake lab – in one space for the first time: 昨天，喜茶在上海丰盛里落地 heytea lab 2.0 全国首店，门店以「未完成」为主题，将 tea lab、cake lab、gelato lab 与 bake lab 四大实验室首次集结于同一空间：

    tea lab : Centered around the custom tea base "Vetiver Oolong," it introduces 3 experimental tea drinks, exploring multi-dimensional flavor possibilities from the same tea base;

    cake lab : Creates new products like "Molten Egg" with Shanghai-style inspiration, emphasizing the cross-category extension of flavor elements;

    gelato lab : Launches "Fluffy Salted Egg Yolk Gelato," combining local ingredients with gelato to offer a differentiated experience;

    bake lab : Debuts in Shanghai for the first time, completing HEYTEA's experimental expression in the baking category.

At the product level, HEYTEA conducted experiments centered around the new custom tea base "Vetiver Oolong," launching three new tea lab products: "Vetiver · Chongming Rice Wine," "Vetiver 7," and "Vetiver 3." These products combine elements such as Chongming rice wine, mangosteen and dill, milk and pecans, respectively, showcasing diverse expressions of the same tea base. 在产品层面，喜茶以全新定制茶底「岩兰乌龙」为核心展开实验，推出「岩兰·崇明米酿」「岩兰 7」与「岩兰 3」三款 tea lab 新品，分别结合崇明米酿、山竹与莳萝、牛乳与碧根果等元素，展示同一茶底的多样化表达。

item.title: 1 点点回应「资助男孩戴千元手表」等争议
item.guid: 1-点点回应「资助男孩戴千元手表」等争议
item.description:
Yesterday, milk tea brand "1 Dian Dian" issued a statement regarding multiple online controversies surrounding its "Dream Launchpad" charity project, responding to public doubts about the conditions of beneficiary families, the source of materials, and project transparency. 昨天，奶茶品牌「1 点点」就其「梦想起航点」公益项目引发的多项网络争议发布声明，回应外界对受助家庭条件、物资来源及项目透明度的质疑。

1 Dian Dian stated that the charity project primarily targets disadvantaged children's families in the local area who are on minimum living allowances, low-income, or live in poor conditions. The selection process involves on-site visits, verification, and joint review by government departments and charitable organizations to ensure that beneficiaries meet the criteria. 1 点点表示，公益项目主要面向当地低保、低收入及居住环境恶劣的困境儿童家庭，筛选流程由政府部门与公益机构实地走访、核验并联合审核，确保帮扶对象符合条件。

As of now, the project has completed renovations for 213 rooms for disadvantaged children, including 119 rooms for girls and 94 for boys. The official statement emphasizes that all beneficiary families have been verified by government and charitable organizations, confirming their simple housing conditions and need for renovation. 截至目前，项目已为 213 间困境儿童房间完成改造，其中女生房间 119 间、男生房间 94 间。官方强调，所有受助家庭均经政府与公益机构核实，确属住房条件简陋、存在改造需求。

Regarding the two controversies recently discussed by public opinion, 1 Dian Dian provides specific explanations: 围绕近期舆论集中讨论的两项争议，1 点点给出具体说明：

    Regarding the doubt that "beneficiary families are not disadvantaged enough": The phone watch worn by the child was purchased by relatives pooling money, primarily to ensure the child's safety when out and about, especially when the father's health is poor; the DJI camera in the photo is a personal item of a volunteer; the comic book was a gift purchased by a volunteer at their own expense after learning of the child's wish.

    Regarding the doubt that "funds designated for girls were used for boys": 1 Dian Dian stated that the project itself is not gender-specific; the "Girls' Comfort Pack" is an independent project specifically for girls, and relevant details were announced at the time of the activity's launch.

The statement also mentioned that to enhance transparency, 1 Dian Dian will further disclose basic information of beneficiary families (with privacy redacted), visit records, before-and-after renovation comparisons, and material sources, to accept public supervision. 声明还提到，为提升透明度，一点点将进一步公开受助家庭基础信息（隐去隐私）、走访记录、改造前后对比及物资来源等内容，接受社会监督。

item.title: 《洛杉矶劫案》开启预售
item.guid: 《洛杉矶劫案》开启预售
item.description:
The crime action film "Den of Thieves" (洛杉矶劫案) has opened for pre-sale and will be released nationwide on March 7th (next Saturday). 犯罪动作片《洛杉矶劫案》已开启预售，影片将于 3 月 7 日（下周六）在全国上映。

The film is directed by Bart Layton and adapted from the novel of the same name by New York Times bestselling author Don Winslow. It tells the story of a shocking heist involving four forces, emphasizing three intertwined destinies and a final ultimate showdown. 影片由巴特・莱顿执导，改编自《纽约时报》畅销书作家唐・温斯洛同名小说，围绕一场牵动四方势力的惊天劫案展开叙事，强调三段命运交错与最终的终极对决。

item.title: 《非穷尽列举》定档 3 月 8 日
item.guid: 《非穷尽列举》定档-3-月-8-日
item.description:
Rosamund Pike's NTLive "A Non-Exhaustive List" (非穷尽列举) has officially opened for national pre-sale and will be released in cinemas nationwide on March 8th. 裴淳华主演的 NTLive《非穷尽列举》已正式开启全国预售，并将于 3 月 8 日登陆全国院线。

The film continues the collaboration of the original creative team from "Prima Facie" (初步举证) and has received a high rating of 9.4 on Douban, consistently attracting attention from the industry and audiences since its official announcement. During preview screenings, the film garnered widespread praise for its tight pacing, strong dramatic tension, and deep exploration of social issues. 影片延续《初步举证》原班主创的合作阵容，并在豆瓣收获 9.4 分的高口碑，自官宣以来持续受到行业与观众关注。点映期间，影片凭借紧凑的节奏、强烈的戏剧张力与对社会议题的深度探讨获得大量好评。

item.title: One Fun Thing｜苹果将跨界推出 Apple Music 巧克力
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜苹果将跨界推出-Apple-Music-巧克力
item.description:
According to MacRumors, Apple is collaborating with German chocolate brand Ritter Sport to launch a limited co-branded campaign. Users who purchase specific 100g square chocolate bars can scan the QR code on the back of the packaging to directly jump to the corresponding album page on Apple Music and receive a free trial. 据 MacRumors 报道，苹果正与德国巧克力品牌 Ritter Sport 合作推出限量联名活动，用户购买特定款式的 100g 方形巧克力时，可通过包装背面的二维码直接跳转至 Apple Music 对应专辑页面，并获得免费试用资格。

This collaboration selected 5 albums considered representative of German music history, covering different genres such as pop, electronic, and rock. 这次合作选择了 5 张被认为对德国音乐史具有代表性的专辑，涵盖流行、电音、摇滚等不同类型。

The campaign will officially launch in Germany on March 2nd local time. The chocolates will gradually become available in local stores, priced at 1.99 Euros (approximately 16 RMB), and will be available for a limited time. 活动将于当地时间 3 月 2 日在德国正式启动，相关巧克力将陆续在当地商店上架，售价为 1.99 欧元（约合 16 元人民币），限时供应。

item.title: 周末看什么｜《诗人》
item.guid: 周末看什么｜《诗人》
item.description:
"The Poet" (Un Poeta), directed by Simón Mesa Soto, centers its narrative on the frustrated life of middle-aged poet Oscar Restrepo. 《诗人》（Un Poeta）由西蒙·梅萨·索托执导，核心叙事聚焦中年诗人奥斯卡·雷斯特雷波的失意人生。

He is obsessed with poetry but has long failed to gain recognition in literary circles, gradually falling into self-doubt under the dual pressures of family and society. A chance encounter leads him to meet Yurady, a girl from a poor community, and he attempts to introduce her to the world of poetry. 他沉迷诗歌创作，却长期得不到文学圈认可，在家庭与社会的双重压力下逐渐陷入自我怀疑。一次偶然的相遇，他结识了来自贫困社区的少女尤拉迪，并试图将她引入诗歌世界。

The film premiered in the "Un Certain Regard" section of the 2025 Cannes Film Festival, with its Douban rating consistently around 8.0. 影片在 2025 年戛纳电影节「一种关注」单元首映，豆瓣评分维持在 8.0 分区间。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《迈向摄影哲学》
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《迈向摄影哲学》
item.description:
"Towards a Philosophy of Photography," written by Vilém Flusser, holds a representative position in the field of media philosophy. 《迈向摄影哲学》由威廉·弗卢塞尔撰写，在媒介哲学领域具有代表性地位。

The work analyzes the generative mechanism of photography as a technical image within a highly abstract theoretical framework, pointing out that the camera, as a typical apparatus, has a programmatic logic that is reshaping human perception, action, and freedom. 作品以高度抽象的理论框架分析摄影作为技术图像的生成机制，指出照相机作为典型装置，其程序化逻辑正在重塑人类的感知、行动与自由。

The book connects concepts such as image, technical image, photographic apparatus, and photographic gesture into a self-consistent theoretical system, proposing that the ideology of the technical image era no longer relies on a single perspective but rather deeply encodes society through programmatic mechanisms. 书中将图像、技术图像、摄影装置、摄影姿态等概念串联为一套自洽的理论系统，提出技术图像时代的意识形态不再依赖单一视角，而是通过程序化机制对社会进行深层编码。

Photographs are viewed as the result of a dual encoding by both the apparatus and the photographer's intention, serving as both information and a feedback mechanism for the apparatus to refine itself. 照片被视为装置与摄影者意图的双重编码结果，既是信息，也是装置完善自身的反馈机制。

item.title: 游戏推荐｜《杀戮尖塔》
item.guid: 游戏推荐｜《杀戮尖塔》
item.description:
"Slay the Spire" is a rogue-like deck-building game developed by American studio MegaCrit. Players must choose one of four characters—The Ironclad, The Silent, The Defect, or The Watcher—to advance through floor exploration using turn-based card combat. 《杀戮尖塔》是一款由美国工作室 MegaCrit 开发的类 Rogue 卡牌构筑游戏，玩家需从《铁卫》《沉默猎手》《缺陷体》《观者》四名角色中选择其一，以回合制卡牌战斗推进楼层探索。

The game's core loop consists of "draw cards—play cards—manage energy—build deck." Maps, enemies, events, and rewards are all randomly generated; death means starting over, but new cards and events can be gradually unlocked, making each attempt unique. 游戏的核心循环由「抽牌—打出卡牌—管理能量—构筑牌组」构成，地图、敌人、事件与奖励均为随机生成，死亡即重来，但可逐步解锁新卡牌与事件，使每次尝试都具备差异性。

In mainstream media reviews, "Slay the Spire" received high praise. IGN gave it an "Amazing" 9/10 score; PC Gamer and Game Informer also awarded high scores of 92/100 and 9.25/10, respectively. The Metacritic PC version's average media score is 92/100, placing it among the top titles in its genre. 在主流媒体评价中，《杀戮尖塔》获得高度肯定。IGN 给出 9/10 分「Amazing」评价；PC Gamer 与 Game Informer 也分别给出 92/100 与 9.25/10 的高分。Metacritic PC 版媒体均分为 92/100，属于同类游戏中的顶尖水平。
